calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustee And Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-12-2022 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustee And Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-15-2022 Continued To Apr-12-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Terrell Root, via CourtCall, for Paul Kildani, in court.

The court and counsel discuss the issues delaying this matter. Counsel reports that Petitioner resides at the real property which is the subject of this matter and that his sons had been given their pecuniary gifts prior to the petition having been filed. The court advises that it will require either the filing of receipts or notice. The court points to the issue of all heirs and the issue of predeceased children and advises counsel that pursuant to code, a supplement regarding the preceding must be on the record. Counsel queries regarding whether he will be required to provide notice once again if he files a supplement. The court is unsure of the preceding but advises counsel that this matter will be continued and if additional notice is required the court will need to continue the matter again unless waivers of notice are filed.

The Petition for Order Confirming, etc., is continued to Apr-12-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustee And Trust Assets
Off Calendar Feb-08-2022 Continued To Mar-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
